calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striiking Claim As To $720.00 U.S. Currency
Off Calendar Jun-11-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Pamela Pecora-Hansen, Esq., Asst. District Attorney, Tel. 415.551.9524, for petitioner and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: Petitioner's counsel stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. There being no appearance by respondent, or objection by counsel, the Court adopted the tentative ruling. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim As To $720.00 U.S. Currency is Granted, for the reasons set forth in Petitioner People of the State of California's motion, which is unopposed. The Court's Judgment of Forfeiture And Disposition Pursuant To Stipulation as to $1,196.00 U.S. Currency, entered on October 1, 2012, left $720.00 U.S. currency to be litigated by Petitioner People of the State of California. The claim of Omar Westbrooks as to $720.00 only shall be stricken and Petitioner be allowed to withdraw the Petition for Forfeiture In Rem. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Mtn For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-18-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling which was uncontested. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Terminating Sanction is denied as moot. Judgment in favor of Petitioner/Moving Party/People has already been entered on October 1, 2012. Court has no jurisdiction to issue requested order. (C.C.P. 1049; Mason & Associates, Inc. v. Guarantee Sav. & Loan Ass'nof Livermore Valley (1969) 269 Cal.App.2d 132, 133-4.) Judge Pro Tem: David May; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories [Proposed Order]
Off Calendar May-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance: Pamela A. Underwood, Asst. District Attorney (415-551-9544) appearing for the PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, petitioner / moving party; no other appearance.

The tentative ruling is adopted. Petitioner PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion to Compel Answers to Petitioner's First Set of Demand for Production and Inspection of Documents; Petitioner's First Set of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is Granted. NO OPPOSITION HAVING BEEN FILED, THE COURT SIGNS THE PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED BY PETITIONER, THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA. NO MONETARY SANCTIONS WILL BE IMPOSED. Judge Pro Tem: Paul A. Renne; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
